thinking.text:
The user is asking to be transferred to a human agent to get more detailed information about their friend's spending progress on the referred account. This is a reasonable request since I don't have access to the detailed spending information for the referred account.

According to the policy, I should transfer the user to a human agent when the issue cannot be resolved or is outside my capabilities. In this case, I cannot access the specific spending details for the referred account, so this is appropriate.

I need to use the transfer_to_human_agents tool with a summary of the user's issue and what was attempted before transfer.

tool_calls.Name: transfer_to_human_agents
tool_calls.Arguments: {"reason": "other", "summary": "Customer Oluwaseun Adeyemi (user ID: 86e92f639e) inquired about a referral bonus for a Silver Rewards Card referral dated November 13, 2025, which shows IN_PROGRESS status. The customer's friend has been using the card, but the customer hasn't received the $75 referral bonus yet. The bonus requires $750 in qualifying spend within 60 days of account opening. Customer is requesting the exact spending amount their friend has accumulated toward the $750 threshold, which is not visible in the referral system. Customer identity was verified via date of birth (02/14/1988) and email (oadeyemi@gmail.com)."}
